title: WebSocket handler manager singleton provider
purpose: Manages a global singleton instance of WebSocketHandler to enable cross-module broadcasting without circular dependencies.
module_context: Exports three functions for managing a global WebSocketHandler singleton instance: initialization, retrieval, and existence checking.

steps.content: Set the global WebSocketHandler instance to the provided handler.
Return the global WebSocketHandler instance if it exists.
Check if the global WebSocketHandler instance has been initialized.
Return true if the handler exists, false otherwise.
